emails.subject: Drug Test for UBS
emails.body: Drug Test for UBS Craig Our records indicate that you have not taken your pre-employment drug test for UBS. Can you please do so ASAP, or if you have already completed, can you please let me know the date that you went so that we can update our records. Thanks! Amy

emails.subject: RE: Drug Test for UBS
emails.body: RE: Drug Test for UBS Thanks Amy- Monday Feb 4th Craig

emails.subject: RE: Drug Test for UBS
emails.body: Great Craig thanks....do you happen to know the location? Amy
